questions.question: What does the adjacency matrix A[i][j] = 1 represent?
questions.questionZh: 邻接矩阵（adjacency matrix）中的 A[i][j] = 1 表示什么？
options: Node i has degree j
There is an edge from node i to node j
Node i and node j have the same label
The shortest path from i to j has length 1
optionsZh: 节点 (Node) i 的度 (Degree) 为 j
存在一条从节点 (node) i 到节点 (node) j 的边 (edge)。
节点 i 和节点 j 具有相同的标签
从 i 到 j 的最短路径 (shortest path) 长度为 1。
questions.explanation: The adjacency matrix is the core representation of a graph. A[i][j] = 1 means there is an edge connecting node i to node j. For undirected graphs, the matrix is symmetric (A[i][j] = A[j][i]).
questions.explanationZh: 邻接矩阵（Adjacency Matrix）是图（Graph）的核心表示形式。A[i][j] = 1 表示节点（Node）i 与节点 j 之间存在一条边（Edge）。对于无向图（Undirected Graph），该矩阵是对称的，即 A[i][j] = A[j][i]。

questions.question: What data structure does BFS use and what does it find?
questions.questionZh: 广度优先搜索（Breadth-First Search）使用什么数据结构？它能找到什么？
options: Stack; finds connected components
Queue; finds shortest paths in unweighted graphs
Priority queue; finds minimum spanning tree
Hash map; finds duplicate nodes
optionsZh: 栈 (Stack)；查找连通分量 (Connected Components)
队列（Queue）；用于在无权图（unweighted graph）中寻找最短路径（shortest path）
优先队列（Priority Queue）；用于查找最小生成树（Minimum Spanning Tree）
哈希表 (Hash Map)；查找重复节点
questions.explanation: BFS uses a queue (FIFO) to explore all neighbors at distance k before moving to distance k+1. This guarantees that the first time a node is discovered, it is via a shortest path from the source.
questions.explanationZh: 广度优先搜索（Breadth-First Search, BFS）使用队列（Queue，FIFO）在推进至距离 k+1 之前，先遍历所有距离为 k 的邻居节点。这确保了节点首次被发现时，必然是通过从源节点（Source）出发的最短路径（Shortest Path）到达的。

questions.question: The graph Laplacian L = D - A of a connected graph has how many zero eigenvalues?
questions.questionZh: 连通图（Connected Graph）的图拉普拉斯矩阵（Graph Laplacian）L = D - A 有多少个零特征值（Zero Eigenvalues）？
options: Zero
Exactly one
Equal to the number of nodes
Equal to the number of edges
optionsZh: Zero
恰好一个
等于节点 (nodes) 数量
等于边的数量
questions.explanation: The number of zero eigenvalues of the Laplacian equals the number of connected components. A connected graph has exactly one connected component, so exactly one zero eigenvalue. A graph with k disconnected pieces has k zero eigenvalues.
questions.explanationZh: 拉普拉斯矩阵（Laplacian matrix）的零特征值（zero eigenvalues）数量等于连通分量（connected components）的数量。连通图（connected graph）恰好只有一个连通分量，因此也恰好只有一个零特征值。包含 k 个不连通部分的图则具有 k 个零特征值。

questions.question: In GNN message passing, what does h_v^(k+1) = sigma(W * mean({h_u^(k) : u in neighbors(v)})) compute?
questions.questionZh: 在图神经网络（Graph Neural Network）的消息传递（message passing）过程中，h_v^(k+1) = sigma(W * mean({h_u^(k) : u in neighbors(v)})) 计算的是什么？
options: The shortest path from v to all other nodes
A new feature vector for node v by aggregating neighbor features, transforming with learned weights, and applying a nonlinearity
The degree of node v at layer k+1
The PageRank score of node v
optionsZh: 从 v 到所有其他节点的最短路径 (Shortest Path)
通过聚合邻居特征 (neighbor features)、使用学习到的权重 (learned weights) 进行变换，并应用非线性激活函数 (nonlinearity)，为节点 v (node v) 生成新的特征向量 (feature vector)。
第 k+1 层节点 v 的度 (degree)
节点 v 的 PageRank 得分
questions.explanation: Each node collects features from its neighbors (mean aggregation), multiplies by a learned weight matrix W, and applies an activation function sigma. After k rounds, each node has information from its k-hop neighborhood.
questions.explanationZh: 每个节点 (node) 收集其邻居节点的特征 (feature)（均值聚合 (mean aggregation)），乘以学习到的权重矩阵 (weight matrix) W，并应用激活函数 (activation function) sigma。经过 k 轮迭代后，每个节点都包含了其 k 跳邻域 (k-hop neighborhood) 的信息。

questions.question: How does spectral clustering use the Fiedler vector (eigenvector of the second-smallest eigenvalue of L)?
questions.questionZh: 谱聚类（Spectral Clustering）是如何利用菲德勒向量（Fiedler vector，即矩阵 L 的第二小特征值对应的特征向量）的？
options: Nodes with the largest Fiedler vector entries form one cluster
Nodes with positive Fiedler vector values go in one group, nodes with negative values go in the other
The Fiedler vector is used as edge weights
The Fiedler vector determines the number of clusters
optionsZh: 对应菲德勒向量 (Fiedler vector) 最大分量的节点构成一个簇。
菲德勒向量（Fiedler vector）值为正的节点归入一组，值为负的节点归入另一组。
菲德勒向量（Fiedler vector）被用作边权重（edge weights）。
菲德勒向量（Fiedler vector）决定了聚类（cluster）的数量。
questions.explanation: The Fiedler vector encodes the smoothest non-trivial function on the graph. Nodes in the same tightly-connected cluster get similar values, while nodes separated by a bottleneck get values with opposite signs. The sign split partitions the graph into two clusters.
questions.explanationZh: 菲德勒向量 (Fiedler vector) 编码了图 (graph) 上最平滑的非平凡函数 (smoothest non-trivial function)。位于同一紧密连接簇 (tightly-connected cluster) 中的节点会获得相似的数值，而被瓶颈 (bottleneck) 分隔的节点则会获得符号相反 (opposite signs) 的数值。符号划分 (sign split) 将该图划分为两个簇。
